name: Mordechai Aviv Taasiot Beniyah (1973) Ltd.
summary: Mordechai Aviv Taasiot Beniyah (1973) Ltd. engages in the planning, construction, marketing, and sale of real estate properties in Israel and internationally. The company undertakes the construction of residential, commercial, and industrial projects. It also offers engineering works in the fields of flooring, electrical, plaster, paint, plumbing, development work, transportation, and logistics, as well as engages in the leasing and operation of real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Saf Or Industrial Construction Ltd. and changed its name to Mordechai Aviv Taasiot Beniyah (1973) Ltd. in March 1993. Mordechai Aviv Taasiot Beniyah (1973) Ltd. was incorporated in 1973 and is based in Jerusalem, Israel.
